EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} created database "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} deleted database "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} could not delete database "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} could not create database "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
